key_results: Patients without disease progression were treated for up to 24 months.
Thirteen percent had stage IIIB disease and 84% had stage IV.
Seventy-six percent of patients had prior surgery and 51% had prior radiation therapy.

key_results: 14.1 Metastatic Merkel Cell Carcinoma The efficacy and safety of BAVENCIO was demonstrated in the JAVELIN Merkel 200 trial (NCT02155647), an open-label, single--arm, multi-center study conducted in patients with histologically confirmed metastatic MCC.

The major efficacy outcome measures were confirmed overall response rate (ORR) according to Response Evaluation Criteria in Solid Tumors (RECIST) v1.1 as assessed by a blinded independent central review committee (IRC) and IRC-assessed duration of response.

drugs.efficacy_snippet: 14.2 Merkel Cell Carcinoma (MCC) The efficacy of ZYNYZ was evaluated in study POD1UM-201 (NCT03599713), an open-label, multiregional, single-arm study in 101 patients with metastatic or recurrent locally advanced MCC who had not received prior systemic therapy for their advanced disease. Patients wi

key_results: Patients received ZYNYZ 500 mg intravenously every 4 weeks until disease progression, unacceptable toxicity, or up to 24 months.
Sixty-eight percent of patients had prior surgery and 37% of patients had prior radiotherapy.
Merkel cell polyomavirus (MCPyV) was detected in 76% of evaluable biopsy samples.

Endpoint ZYNYZ (N = 101) Objective Response Rate (95% CI) 55% (44, 64) Complete responses, n (%) 18 (18) Partial responses, n (%) 37 (37) Duration of Response N = 55 Range, months 1.1 to 55.3+ Patients with DOR ≥ 12 months, n (%) 38 (69) Patients with DOR ≥ 24 months, n (%) 25 (46)
